summary: 2026-07-12 17:15 PDT — The client simplification matches the specification, but the branch is not merge-ready because the binding live Zoom UUID gate remains unverified. Static test/build execution was blocked by the read-only sandbox when Vite attempted to create `.vite-temp`; this is not itself a code finding.

findings.title: Binding self-UUID live gate is not satisfied
findings.claim: The diff removes the participant-list fallback and now derives the base-video UUID exclusively from `getUserContext`. If that response lacks `participantUUID`, lines 321–329 deliberately skip `drawParticipant`, producing a meter without the required base video. The spec explicitly requires an in-meeting live confirmation before merge, and the branch history/build note provides no evidence that this gate was completed; the review note instead records it as outstanding.
findings.suggestion: Run the branch in a live Zoom development meeting and confirm the `drawParticipant` lifecycle log reports `ok: true`. Record that evidence in the review story. If it reports `no self participantUUID`, stop shipment and restore or replace the UUID-resolution path.
